configurations.name: Full Monorepo (Turbo)
configurations.description: Starts the Next.js web app + all TypeScript watchers concurrently via Turborepo. Use this for active development across multiple packages.

configurations.name: Web App only (Next.js)
configurations.description: Starts only the Next.js web app on port 3000. Faster to boot — use this when you only need the frontend running.
